insights.title: ANN leads on net efficiency
insights.detail: The ANN panel trails raw tracker output only slightly but delivers higher net efficiency after movement savings are considered.

insights.title: Conventional wins on immediate peak power
insights.detail: When the sky remains clear, the conventional tracker still posts the strongest raw power spikes due to constant alignment.

insights.title: Fixed remains the clean baseline
insights.detail: The fixed array provides the simplest, most stable reference and helps quantify the gain of active tracking strategies.

insights.title: Movement cost is now visible
insights.detail: Frequent conventional adjustments produce higher output, but they also introduce a measurable actuation energy penalty compared with ANN control.

rankings.label: Best overall
rankings.reason: Highest energy today with fewer tracker movements and the strongest efficiency score.

rankings.label: Best raw output
rankings.reason: Continuous tracking still delivers the biggest instantaneous power peaks.

rankings.label: Best energy-saving movement
rankings.reason: Selective positioning halves the movement count while staying close to the tracker’s output.

rankings.label: Best baseline reference
rankings.reason: Zero movement cost and steady behavior make it the clearest control system.
